name: Joseph Desaulniers ᯓ Désire Mélodis
description:
♱ ݁ IDV : What makes him joyous? The chase or the prey?

A merciful count with an untainted public image. The feeling there was more that met the eye gnawed at you from the inside, pushing you to accept the invitation he had sent you. Could a ball truly hurt you after all?

Published chat contains first message as the definition is closed.
